title: Celebrating Ethereum at 10 — Greenpill Nigeria Awka
dek: A public Luma event page supports an Awka event tying ReFi education, POAPs, partner projects, and Water Cup visibility together.
excerpt: Greenpill Nigeria's Awka Ethereum-at-10 event gives the chapter a source-backed local events story.
body:
The Luma source gives the site a clean public event proof point for Greenpill Nigeria.

Use this as an event recap / local activation seed. Do not treat RSVP or attendance numbers as available unless a source-backed count is added later.

## Sources
